description_long: This is a rectangular carton of Faragello Gold premium orange juice, featuring a predominantly white and gold color scheme. The front displays a large, realistic image of an orange, along with the product name and details in gold and gray text. The sides of the carton show nutritional information, ingredients, and branding, with one side panel almost entirely covered in text. The top of the carton is sealed and has a folded spout, typical of juice cartons, but no visible screw cap or pull tab. The packaging is made of laminated cardboard, likely with a thin plastic lining to contain the liquid inside. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed for easy handling and pouring.
description: A rectangular white and gold Faragello Gold orange juice carton with a realistic orange image and detailed branding. The carton features a folded spout and extensive nutritional information on the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and part of the nutritional panel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label and a large orange illustration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with 'FARAGELLO' branding and additional product information.
description_view_3: Back view dominated by nutritional facts and multilingual product details.
